name: Boundary Mantras
description: A collection of mantras to help you set and maintain healthy boundaries in your relationships and daily life.
author: David Ralph

quotes.quote: My time and energy are valuable.
Everyone doesn't need to like me.
I accept that I cannot control everything.
I am not responsible for other people's feelings.
I can ask for what I need.
I am allowed to change my mind.
I am not obligated to explain myself.
It's rewarding to honor my boundaries.
